notes: Phase 2.2 — UnifiedToken v2 with SPL-delegate approve deployed. approve() now does both EVM allowance + SPL Token Approve CPI; approve(0) issues SPL Revoke. Compound supply pattern (transferFrom user→comet) now executes end-to-end without separate Solana wallet steps.
